BASE_URL.description: Public URL Plausible instance (e.g., https://plausible.yourdomain.com). Required Plausible start.

SECRET_KEY_BASE.description: 64-byte random string cookie signing secrets. Auto-generated.

DATABASE_URL.description: PostgreSQL connection string. Auto-injected by Railway Postgres plugin.

PGDATA.description: PostgreSQL data directory. Must start with /var/lib/postgresql/data.

DISABLE_REGISTRATION.description: Set true disable public registration after creating admin account.

ENABLE_EMAIL_VERIFICATION.description: Set true require email verification new users.
